'''Crimson Command''' was the command division of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Quelii Oversector]]. Initially serving under Warlord [[Zsinj]], it would become the [[Wikipedia:De facto|de facto]] [[Flotilla/Legends|flotilla]] post-[[Endor/Legends|Endor]] of the [[Federated Teradoc Union]], and later the [[United Warlord Fleets]], consisting of Imperial [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyers]].

==Description==
The command was dubbed "Crimson" for the [[Color/Legends|red]]-hulled [[Havod/Legends|havod]] alloy ''Victory''-class Star Destroyers contained within it. Its [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] was the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[13X]]''. The fleet was designed under the premise that it was better to have a large number of smaller, more mobile ships than a smaller number of larger, slower ships.<ref name="Darksaber" />

==History==
Prior to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the Crimson Command was given to [[Zsinj]], [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] of the [[Quelii Oversector]], in recognition of his brilliant career. The fleet joined his [[Sector fleet/Legends|Sector Fleet]] which became the largest [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of the Empire and Zsinj received the title of [[High Admiral]] of Crimson Command.<ref name="TEGtW" />

The fleet fell under the control of the self-styled [[Treuten Teradoc|"High Admiral" Treuten Teradoc]], a breakaway Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]] after the death of warlord Zsinj. In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], the flotilla's commanding [[Officer/Legends|officer]] was [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]. At this time, they numbered 73 ''Victory''-class Star Destroyers, with 11 being destroyed at the [[Battle of Harrsk's fortress]].<ref name="Darksaber" />

Following the unification of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] warlords by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]], the unit's number would be increased to 112 warships, not all of which had red hulls, yet it would retain the name Crimson Command. In a series of guerrilla raids against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], two of the ships were destroyed, both at the [[Battle of the Chardaan Shipyards|attack]] on the [[Chardaan Shipyards]].<ref name="Darksaber" />

[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ivan Cronus]] was appointed to take twenty of the Crimson Command ships to help in Daala's [[Assault on Yavin 4|assault]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], leaving the remainder to continue their guerrilla raiding. During Daala's failed assault on the [[Jedi Praxeum]], three Crimson Command ships (including ''13X'') were destroyed in combat against a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet, killing Cronus and all those aboard.<ref name="Darksaber" />
